name: Real Estate Tools
description: Private agent-core integration tools for the Real State Agent workspace.

baseUrl.description: Base URL for the local agent-core HTTP service.

internalApiKeyEnvVar.description: Environment variable name holding the internal bearer token.

companyId.description: Private company UUID used for internal conversation operations.

channel.description: Internal conversation channel. Must match the backend channel enum.

timeoutMs.description: Default HTTP timeout for agent-core requests.
